overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a suburban Los Santos neighborhood during golden hour. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses a street, and passes various pedestrians and vehicles with the downtown skyline and mountains visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with tree canopy

events.description: character begins crossing the street from right sidewalk to left

agents.ego_description: walking along tree-lined sidewalk then stepping onto the street to cross

entered.detail: single-story yellow house with red roof and white trim
standard blue USPS mailbox on concrete pad
large spreading tree branches creating dappled shade overhead
row of tall palm trees lining the street into the distance
tall downtown skyscrapers visible on the horizon
ornate black metal street lamp post with curved design
wooden utility poles with multiple overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a suburban sidewalk shaded by large trees. A distinctive yellow stucco house sits on the right while a blue mailbox stands on the left. The character walks forward beneath the canopy, passing parked cars, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance. Around the 12-second mark, the character steps off the curb to cross the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential street with pedestrian activity

events.description: completes crossing and steps onto opposite sidewalk
passing a yellow fire hydrant on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walking in opposite direction passes by

entered.detail: two-story brown house with dark roof and front porch
low red brick wall along the property line
bright yellow fire hydrant on the grass verge
distant mountain range becoming visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the character now walks along the opposite sidewalk in full sunlight. A brown two-story house with a brick retaining wall dominates the right side. The character passes a yellow fire hydrant and encounters a pedestrian with red hair walking the other way. The distant mountains begin to appear on the right horizon while the city skyline remains visible on the left.

events.description: large military cargo truck drives past on the street
pedestrian in bright yellow jacket passes close to camera on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing walk along sidewalk with open views of distant mountains and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: military cargo truck driving down the street
pedestrian in bright yellow jacket walking past camera

entered.detail: modern curved house with large windows and wooden fence
tall wooden privacy fence along property line

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to wider views as the character walks past a curved modern house with a wooden fence. A military truck rumbles past on the street, followed by a close encounter with a pedestrian in a bright yellow jacket. The city skyline fades from view while the mountains become more prominent in the center background. The sidewalk continues through the residential neighborhood with various houses passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential street with clear mountain backdrop

events.description: police sedan parked on the side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk passing a parked police car with mountains visible ahead

notable_agents.action: police sedan parked on the street shoulder

entered.detail: two-story dark-colored house with gabled roof

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character walks past a dark two-story house on the left where a police car is parked on the street. The curved house and wooden fence from the previous section fall behind. The mountains shift to the right side of the frame as the character continues down the sidewalk. The street remains quiet with minimal traffic as the golden hour lighting continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a suburban neighborhood that shifts from shaded sidewalks to open, sun-drenched streets as the distant city skyline gives way to prominent mountains. It begins beneath a canopy of large trees, passing a yellow stucco house and a blue mailbox before the character steps off the curb to cross the street. As the camera moves into full sunlight, the scene transitions to a sidewalk lined with a brown two-story house and a brick wall, where a red-haired pedestrian passes by. The view then expands past a curved modern house and a wooden fence as a military truck rumbles past and a pedestrian in a yellow jacket appears, causing the city skyline to fade while the mountains move toward the center of the frame. Finally, the camera glides past a dark two-story house and a parked police car, with the mountains shifting to the right as the character continues through the quiet residential street under the warm glow of golden hour.
